meta.title: Shaper: Data Shaper (10000w)
description: Shaper: Data Shaper (10000w) replays live-power input through the current shaper rather than solar-divert control.
Fixed high power-cap case where charger or EV limits are more likely to dominate than the shaper cap.
Compare live power, smoothed live power, shaper maximum, available charge power, and actual charge power to see how the limiter reacts.
